name: PropertyCommands
summary: Graphisoft official 'Property Commands' command group — 10 JSON-RPC commands (Archicad 29.0).

methods.name: GetAllPropertyGroupIds
methods.summary: Returns the identifier of every property group in the current plan. The optional propertyType parameter can be used to filter the results based on the type of the property group (Built-in or User Defined).

returns.doc: Returns an object with properties: propertyGroupIds.

methods.name: GetAllPropertyIds
methods.summary: Returns the identifier of every property in the current plan. The optional propertyType parameter can be used to filter the results based on the type of the property (Built-in or User Defined).

returns.doc: Returns an object with properties: propertyIds.

methods.name: GetAllPropertyIdsOfElements
methods.summary: Returns all property identifiers of the given elements. The optional propertyType parameter can be used to filter the results based on the type of the property (Built-in or User Defined).

returns.doc: Returns an object with properties: propertyIdsOfElements.

methods.name: GetAllPropertyNames
methods.summary: Returns the human-readable names of available Property definitions for debug and development purposes.

returns.doc: Returns an object with properties: properties.

methods.name: GetDetailsOfProperties
methods.summary: Returns the details of property definitions.

returns.doc: Returns an object with properties: propertyDefinitions.

methods.name: GetPropertyDefinitionAvailability
methods.summary: Returns the ids of classification items a given property definition is available for.

returns.doc: Returns an object with properties: propertyDefinitionAvailabilityList.

methods.name: GetPropertyGroups
methods.summary: Returns the details of property groups.

returns.doc: Returns an object with properties: propertyGroups.

methods.name: GetPropertyIds
methods.summary: Returns the identifiers of property definitions for the requested property names.

params.name: properties
params.doc: List of property names whose ids are requested.

returns.doc: Returns an object with properties: properties.

methods.name: GetPropertyValuesOfElements
methods.signature: GetPropertyValuesOfElements(elements: Elements, properties: PropertyIds, onlySupportedTypes?: boolean): object
methods.summary: Returns the property values of the elements for the given property.

params.name: onlySupportedTypes
params.doc: Optional parameter. When it is set to true, only elements with types that are supported by any other JSON API command will be returned.

returns.doc: Returns an object with properties: propertyValuesForElements.

methods.name: SetPropertyValuesOfElements
methods.summary: Sets the property values of elements.

returns.doc: Returns an object with properties: executionResults.
